author: Nils T.
pros: The automated prospecting and the ability to make it personal once you get in contact
cons: The fact that the amount of e-mail addresses that Zaplify found didn't meet my expectations.

review_title: Recommended for all sales oriented companies
description: Zaplify ha evolved into a competent sales automation tool which has helped us gain several clients for our business.
author: Andreas K.
pros: Zaplify's most appealing aspects to me are its remarkable user-friendliness and its strong focus on delivering tangible results.
cons: One issue I've encountered is that it can be challenging to maintain a clear overview of prospects, which occasionally results in contacting certain leads multiple times unintentionally.

description: They are really friendly in the beginning but turns out this was a lie. When we complained over the system and that they didn’t gave us what they have promised we anyway needed to pay for a year. We have now change system and it works perfect. This system got our customer angry and even prospect. Think one and two times before choise this system before competitors.
author: Victor M.
pros: Easy to get started and set-up. Got good help to start.
cons: They are really friendly in the beginning but turns out this was a lie. When we complained over the system and that they didn’t gave us what they have promised we anyway needed to pay for a year. We have now change system and it works perfect. This system got our customer angry and even prospect. Think one and two times before choise this system before competitors.

description: Really good! Would very much recommend to anyone to create leads while growing LinkedIn network
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Very easy to set up and get started, efficient in finding relevant people and good sorting mechanism connected to HubSpot.
cons: While continuously improving, analytics may be on a delay and not always be accurate. Would also wish to fully customise workflows.

description: Good experience. I've tried using a competitor before, and zaplify is cheaper and better.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: -integrates with salesforce-inexpensive -good filtering when searching for prospects
cons: -statistics is sometimes not 100% accurate. Although that's OK since the statistics in Zaplify is still in Beta version.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Really bad. Think about it twice before buying. They didn’t work and we didn’t even got a refund.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: In the beginning they was really supportive and friendly, but then when it didn’t work we got really big problems with them.
cons: Didn’t work and sent mail to our customers and dubble mails to prospect that got really mad at us.

description: I have with no experience before created a hole crm system for my company that is working out very well. No empoyer in history at my company has ever booked as many meetings as i do with this system.
author: Alicia S.
pros: It is a very simple Product to use and the possebilites are endless. You can decide if you want to only do mails ore only Linkedin. And they also have a very good statistics program you can keep track and evaluate every campaign. If you really use it a maximum capasity like i do you will never be low on leads. They also have a very good customer service ho are always very nice and helpfull. You can also impact the product by telling them what fetures you would like, creating your perfect plattform for sales.
cons: It does not get phone numbers wich is still a very effective way to sell. In the future there is a risk emails will be blocked, but with zap i have not noticed that problem at all the emails always reach the person ore it will bounce back, but that will happen in all sales programs.

review_title: Useful tool! Saved me lot's of time
description: Overall positive, it has saved me so much time.
author: Olivia K.
pros: The most important element to Zaplify is that it has provided me access to sales leads I otherwise wouldn't have been able to contact efficiently
cons: The bugs in the platform such as how it can be a bit slow sometimes or there have been times where the email copy hasn't been right in the email contra what I have as input in Zaplify.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Zaplify makes my work ALOT easier
description: The automation frees up alot of time and makes my days more effective.
author: Axel F.
pros: The ease of finding new leads, how easy it is to contact them and that you get both a mail and linkedin profile for only 1 credit.
cons: Sometimes the data is not correct so I spend credits without getting any value from them.

description: Zaplify is really easy to use and what we basically have done is to automize the things we used to do manually. Simple as that. Today everything goes super fast and in order to be top of game and work smart, Zaplify has been a need to have tool for us.
author: Daniel G.
pros: The product/solution in it's self and the outstanding support that you get.
cons: Overall very satisfied with the product and the main issues that you might end up having is all about yourself. Bad copy for instance gives no good results and that is totally on your self.

description: I find Zaplify to be a great tool to use, simple and user-friendly. The collaboration with [sensitive content hidden] from Zaplify has been excellent; she is always available and provides answers to any questions we have.
author: Fanny G.
pros: It is a simple, well-functioning tool for sales. Through the use of Zaplify, we have gained an easy way to reach out to new customers.
cons: Sometimes there are issues with the email addresses of potential leads.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Marc H.
pros: Easy to use and really good onboarding. I got results directly when I started to use the system.
cons: I would like an easy way to see which company you already have contact
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Valuable tool for brand awareness, help the sales process and reach out to numerous industries!
author: Mårten O.
pros: Zaplify is easy to use from the start. It adds a dimension to the sales process and help reaching out to many industries.
cons: In selecting prospects I would like to have more alternatives than going from page to page.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Managed to grow my Linkedin Followers with 2500+ followers within 3 months
description: I was really satisfied with my experience using Zaplify.
author: Daniel L.
pros: Using Zaplify i was managed to scale up my Linkedin Account with my target group for becoming a thought leader within Growth marketing
cons: I was missing some AI features to scale up the lead automation faster.

review_title: Zaplify is a great investment for us
description: Zaplify helps me with the most critical part of our sales process and this creates a certain peace of mind. Now I can take a more strategic role and put more effort into how this can be improved and small improvements every week make a huge difference over time.
author: Wilhelm S.
pros: Zaplify gives me contact and dialogue with new potential customers
cons: There are challenges with any new system and I've run a few campaigns that didn't work well. Then you have to remove the ego and the personal pride and think about how this can be done better.

description: Great tool that saves us time and the people working there are brilliant!
author: Karin A.
pros: It saves us a lot of time. That's great!
cons: It is sometimes obvious that the email is sent out by a machine.

review_title: Great platform for automated lead generation
description: Overall very good and I have had some really good leads generated thanks to this platform.
author: Daniel B.
pros: Easy to reach out to alot of potential prospects without putting to much effort into it. Saving alot of time using Zaplify compared to doing it manually.
cons: Could be even more automated when choosing the prospects and workflows.

author: Erkki S.
pros: Its easy too use and helps you to automate the comunication with persons you never met before
cons: I takes to long to update the statistics
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Dan T.
pros: That you can process many customers at the same time and avoid all cold calls.
cons: The system is "slow" to search in when, for example, searching by county.

author: Vilma H.
pros: I think that Zaplify is very user friendly and easy to learn. I like that there is different options on how to chose your workflow.
cons: What I like the least is that if you are searching for people with a very specific job title, sometimes it doesn´t show up new options for similar working titles. The search function could improve a bit, so that you don´t get the same suggested companys all the time, or people that don´t have the position that you originally searched for.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Increases my contact network, and facilitates meetings and lead generation.
author: Ulrika Å.
pros: Zap does its thing. Fast. Creates flow. Is consistent. Communicates back.
cons: Not always easy to search/find the best matching credits using Zap as a search engine.

review_title: Interesting service, too early to give an overall rating
description: So far too early to say. Less leads than anticipated so far.
author: Roger G.
pros: The scheduled email and Linkedin-chain. It would have been even better to add also an sms-chain with several text messages and follow ups.
cons: It makes my email box pretty messy because you can have around 50-60 outgoing emails on one single day and several autoreplys in the inbox.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Christoffer C.
pros: I like the simplicity of setting up campaigns and adjusting them and finding contacts.
cons: The limitation to Linkedin regarding paths for finding companies.

review_title: Great tool for sales and customer segmentation!
author: Sophie C.
pros: The customer service is amazing, always available and helps you use the platform in the most efficient way.
cons: It's all good, there was nothing that I disliked. There was a little barrier to learning the tricks, but easily overcome.

description: By using Zaplify we can be much more efficient to find and prospect new customers within our target group. When working closely with the tool and combinding the automation and AI with manual work such as, calling or mailing we receive the absolute best outcome.
author: Magnus R.
pros: Zaplify is the ultimate tool to find and reach out to your target group. By combining automation, AI, and manual work tasks, Zaplify gives us far more customer meetings than any other tool I have used.
cons: It would be great to be able to create your own customised workflow.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
